presenceCondition:
(or (and CONFIG_PCI
         (not __need___FILE)
         __STRICT_ANSI__
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         CONFIG_PCI)
    (and CONFIG_PCI (not __need___FILE) (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES) CONFIG_PCI)
    (and CONFIG_PCI
         (not __need___FILE)
         (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         CONFIG_PCI))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_PCI () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __need___FILE () Bool
  false)
reasoning: mask = node_to_cpumask_map[node] at L133 or L135 can return NULL when !CONFIG_DEBUG_PER_CPU_MAPS (the static inline cpumask_of_node without debug guards returns node_to_cpumask_map[node] directly). *mask at L137 then dereferences a NULL pointer. No // ERROR in the file; new bug. PC simplifies to CONFIG_PCI (the three OR clauses cover all combinations of !__need___FILE, STRICT_ANSI, USE_EXTERN_INLINES which cancel to CONFIG_PCI AND !__need___FILE, and !__need___FILE is non-restrictive). PC is under-constrained: it includes CONFIG_DEBUG_PER_CPU_MAPS=T configs where the bug cannot occur (cpumask_of_node has NULL guards in that case).
